intent: Write a brief on 'a /f/science finding that /f/news covered and the Wikipedia article either confirms or complicates'. You MUST research BOTH sources: (1) Reddit — find at least 3 posts across /f/science and /f/news that discuss a single research finding or scientific topic. Collect title, score, comment count. (2) Wikipedia — open the Wikipedia article most relevant to the finding and extract 3-4 facts. The report must: (a) name the finding and summarize community framing, (b) compare against Wikipedia, (c) note one way news/community framing differs from the encyclopedic record, (d) close with a 'what a reader should remember' note. Cite every claim.
author_notes: Easy tier. Reddit (science + news) + Wikipedia. Simple science-in-the-news verification.
